items.title: Expose GitHub webhook proxy
acceptance: POST /github/webhook forwards the raw body and GitHub delivery, event, and signature headers to the configured Theorem harness webhook upstream.
POST /api/github/webhook uses the same forwarding path for hosts that prefer API namespace routing.
When no upstream is configured, the route returns an honest 503 response and does not attempt a network call.

items.title: Expose server side GitHub ingestion status
acceptance: GET /api/theorem/github/status returns the public webhook URL, proxy path, upstream configured state, and optional GitHub App install URL.
The status response never exposes server side webhook secrets, app private keys, or upstream credentials.
Route tests cover configured and unconfigured environments.

items.title: Connect CommonPlace UI
acceptance: The Accounts product surface loads /api/theorem/github/status and shows the real webhook URL.
The GitHub App install action appears only when a real install URL is configured.
The panel has no mock state or inert controls.

items.title: Visual project gate
acceptance: The Accounts addition keeps the existing operational layout and does not create a marketing or prototype surface.
Controls remain readable in the constrained right column.
Validation records whether browser visual capture was run.
items.validation: Browser visual capture was attempted against the local dev server, but the Playwright browser MCP could not launch because /Applications/Google Chrome.app was not installed. Endpoint validation and touched-file ESLint passed.

items.title: Create CommonPlace quality checklist manifest
acceptance: apps/web/scripts/commonplace-quality-checklist.json lists token contrast pairs, static source roots, data view source files, route surfaces, and pending rendered checks.
The checklist distinguishes static checks that can run now from axe, APG, keyboard, target size, and rendered data view checks that need browser tooling.
The checklist covers /commonplace, /commonplace/mobile, and the primary CommonPlace sidebar views.
items.validation: Manifest added and read by the CommonPlace quality audit script.

items.title: Implement executable CommonPlace quality audit
acceptance: The audit computes WCAG contrast for intended token pairs instead of judging color by eye.

The audit scans CommonPlace files for raw color literals, typography floors, line height floors, motion duration limits, reduced motion coverage, focus visible coverage, and data view static math hazards.
The audit can optionally smoke test listed routes with a local base URL and records render dependent checks as pending until axe and APG tooling is wired.
items.validation: node scripts/commonplace-quality-audit.mjs is available through npm run quality:commonplace from apps/web.

items.title: Repair base CommonPlace token contrast failures
acceptance: Chrome muted text, sidebar faint text, and terminal muted text meet the 4.5:1 normal text threshold on their intended surfaces.
The contrast gate has no hard failures for the token pairs listed in the executable checklist.
Token changes stay in src/styles/commonplace-tokens.css and do not add one off component overrides.
items.validation: npm run quality:commonplace with contrast scope from apps/web reported pass 36, warn 0, fail 0, pending 0.

items.title: Wire rendered accessibility checks
acceptance: The audit runs axe against each listed CommonPlace route and view state.
The audit verifies keyboard behavior for menu, tab, dialog, combobox, and grid patterns that appear in CommonPlace.
The audit verifies target sizes in rendered desktop and mobile viewports.
items.validation: Partial. After restarting the wedged dev server, HTTP smoke against localhost:3040 returned 200 for /commonplace and /commonplace/mobile. Playwright MCP/browser-render checks are still blocked because /Applications/Google Chrome.app is missing; npx playwright install chrome requested sudo and could not run noninteractively.

items.title: Burn down typography and motion hard failures
acceptance: All CommonPlace text sizes meet the absolute readable floor or are explicitly exempted as non textual decorative marks.
All CommonPlace line heights meet the configured floor.
Long motion durations above the absolute max are reduced or explicitly moved behind a reduced motion safe path.
items.validation: npm run quality:commonplace with localhost:3040 reported pass 39, warn 1862, fail 0, pending 9 after the hard typography and motion burn-down.

items.title: Burn down warning-level token, typography, and reduced-motion debt
acceptance: Raw color warnings outside token definition files are either tokenized or explicitly exempted.
Typography warnings below the readable 12px target are raised or classified as non-body metadata.
Motion declarations either use the configured 100-500ms range or include explicit reduced-motion coverage.
items.validation: Pending. The full CommonPlace quality audit currently reports 1862 warnings: mostly token-lint, typography under the readable target, and reduced-motion coverage.
